Localization.Description: The soft mode is enabled or disabled

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.name} failed to enable the soft mode on the crypto gateway {datafield1}
The user {subject.name} failed to disable the soft mode on the crypto gateway {datafield1}
The user {subject.name} disabled the soft mode on the crypto gateway {datafield1}
The user {subject.name} enabled the soft mode on the crypto gateway {datafield1}
